mapper.select: SELECT r.role_code FROM sys_role r INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND r.status = 1 ORDER BY r.role_code

SELECT p.permission_code FROM sys_permission p INNER JOIN sys_role_permission rp ON rp.permission_id = p.id INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON ur.role_id = rp.role_id INNER JOIN sys_role r ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND r.status = 1 AND p.status = 1 AND p.permission_code IS NOT NULL AND p.permission_code <> '' ORDER BY p.permission_code
